summary: TWO_COLUMN stacked: top input number line with BLUE point + ORANGE interval; bottom output number line showing k·x image + stretched interval; DashedLine connector. Two ValueTrackers k_tr and x_tr; k_tr tours through 2, -1, 0.5, 3, 0, 1 showing scaling/flipping/collapse. Live (k, x, kx, |det T| = |k|) panel.
